pinpoint.segment.segmentdimensions.Attri.Description: One or more custom attributes to use as criteria for the segment.

pinpoint.segment.segmentdimensions.Behav.Description: The behavior-based criteria, such as how recently users have used your app, for the segment.

pinpoint.segment.segmentdimensions.Demog.Description: The demographic-based criteria, such as device platform, for the segment.

pinpoint.segment.segmentdimensions.Locat.Description: The location-based criteria, such as region or GPS coordinates, for the segment.

pinpoint.segment.segmentdimensions.Metri.Description: One or more custom metrics to use as criteria for the segment.

pinpoint.segment.segmentdimensions.UserA.Description: One or more custom user attributes to use as criteria for the segment.
